response.justification: The candidate is a highly experienced and skilled senior developer, but his expertise lies predominantly in web technologies (TypeScript, Node.js) and DLang. The role's primary requirement is deep, modern C++ experience for high-performance systems, which is not reflected in his resume. His only professional C++ role was brief and nearly a decade ago, and he lacks any stated experience with the required industrial security standards like IEC 62443 or specific IoT protocols.
strengths: Extensive experience (15+ years) in senior and staff-level software engineering roles.
Strong background in event-driven architectures, microservices, and high-throughput systems.
Broad skill set across web, mobile, and backend development, demonstrating adaptability.
concerns: Virtually no recent or significant C++ experience; the role is fundamentally a C++ developer position.
Lacks any mentioned experience with required security standards (SDL, IEC 62443) or industrial automation protocols.
Experience is heavily skewed towards web technologies (JS/TS, Node, React) and DLang, not the on-premises/embedded C++ focus of the job.
